summary: Nano Machine Jackson continues his winning streak in a high-stakes arena battle by defeating the Hungry Boxer. Despite opponents trying to identify him as Daniel, the master of the Tram Corps Guild, the fighter maintains his persona while displaying incredible swordsmanship that rivals the legendary Milligod. Following his third consecutive victory, it is revealed that the protagonist is acting with complete autonomy and secrecy regarding his true identity.
key_moments: Nano Machine Jackson defeats the Hungry Boxer to secure his third consecutive win.
The opponent attempts to expose Jackson as Daniel from the Tram Corps Guild, but Jackson maintains his cover.
A behind-the-scenes conversation confirms the protagonist is manipulating the broadcast situation while Yeongchan expresses concern.
